message.content: I cannot mark this pipeline complete yet because runtime preflight failed: Credential field(s) api_key contain a literal value; expected a wired secret reference.. Suggested fix: Wire each credential field through the Secrets panel (produces a {secret_ref: NAME} marker) instead of typing the value directly.
